manifest.leakagePolicy: Targets are labels/ground-truth ONLY and must never be used as Tibot features or live-inference columns. TA v3 marks gann_swing_change/top/bottom as target-only, feature_safe=false; gann_swing/gann_count are causal and feature-safe, but any target DERIVED from future swings here is a label only. Gann and EMA-reversal targets use future events and REQUIRE purged + embargoed splits.
manifest.nullPolicy: Terminal/unavailable labels remain NaN. No filling.

parameters.ema_reversal_definition: next EMA-9/EMA-21 crossover opposite to current EMA trend
parameters.gann_target_definition: bars/pct/direction to the next confirmed Gann swing extremum

gannEventContract.direction_convention: top extremum => next 'down'; bottom extremum => next 'up'
gannEventContract.availability: Gann events are indexed at extremum bar t but observable at close_of_bar_t+1 (lookahead_bars=1). Effective label horizon for a row = bars_to_next_swing + 1.
gannEventContract.policy: Future confirmed Gann swing extrema used as labels only. Never use as features.

columns.name: target_reversal_direction_ema_9_21
columns.desc: Direction of the next EMA-9/21 reversal.

columns.name: target_gann_bars_to_next_swing
columns.desc: Bars to the next confirmed Gann swing.

columns.name: target_gann_pct_to_next_swing
columns.desc: % move to the next Gann swing extremum.

columns.name: target_gann_next_direction
columns.desc: Direction of the next Gann swing.
